CustomField.label: Active BiOp on File
CustomField.description: True when an ESA §7 Biological Opinion is active on this NEPA process. Checked by NEPA_BiOp_Reinitiation_Checker to determine whether reinitiation triggers (50 CFR §402.16) require an ESA Coordinator Task and a +12 risk delta.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Set to true when a formal BiOp has been issued for this project. Drives automatic ESA §7 reinitiation evaluation on each field inspection visit.
